title: Gradient Testing and Estimation by Comparisons
abstract:
arXiv:2405.11454v3 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: We study gradient testing and gradient estimation of smooth functions using only a comparison oracle that, given two points, indicates which one has the larger function value. For any smooth $f\colon\mathbb R^n	o\mathbb R$, $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb R^n$, and $\varepsilon>0$, we design a gradient testing algorithm that determines whether the normalized gradient $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ is $\varepsilon$-close or $2\varepsilon$-far from a given unit vector $\mathbf{v}$ using $O(1)$ queries, as well as a gradient estimation algorithm that outputs an $\varepsilon$-estimate of $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ using $O(n\log(1/\varepsilon))$ queries which we prove to be optimal. Furthermore, we study gradient estimation in the quantum comparison oracle model where queries can be made in superpositions, and develop a quantum algorithm using $O(\log (n/\varepsilon))$ queries.

Title: Gradient Testing and Estimation by Comparisons
Abstract: arXiv:2405.11454v3 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: We study gradient testing and gradient estimation of smooth functions using only a comparison oracle that, given two points, indicates which one has the larger function value. For any smooth $f\colon\mathbb R^n	o\mathbb R$, $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb R^n$, and $\varepsilon>0$, we design a gradient testing algorithm that determines whether the normalized gradient $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ is $\varepsilon$-close or $2\varepsilon$-far from a given unit vector $\mathbf{v}$ using $O(1)$ queries, as well as a gradient estimation algorithm that outputs an $\varepsilon$-estimate of $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ using $O(n\log(1/\varepsilon))$ queries which we prove to be optimal. Furthermore, we study gradient estimation in the quantum comparison oracle model where queries can be made in superpositions, and develop a quantum algorithm using $O(\log (n/\varepsilon))$ queries.
translated_title: 基于比较的梯度测试与估计
translated_abstract:
我们研究利用仅能比较两个点函数值大小的比较预言机，对光滑函数进行梯度测试与梯度估计。对于任意光滑函数 $f\colon\mathbb R^n	o\mathbb R$、点 $\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb R^n$ 以及 $\varepsilon>0$，我们设计了一种梯度测试算法，能够以 $O(1)$ 次查询判断归一化梯度 $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ 是 $\varepsilon$-接近还是 $2\varepsilon$-远离给定的单位向量 $\mathbf{v}$；同时，我们还设计了一种梯度估计算法，能以 $O(n\log(1/\varepsilon))$ 次查询输出 $
abla f(\mathbf{x})/\|
abla f(\mathbf{x})\|$ 的 $\varepsilon$-估计，并证明该查询复杂度是最优的。此外，我们研究了量子比较预言机模型下的梯度估计，其中查询可以叠加进行，并开发了一种仅需 $O(\log (n/\varepsilon))$ 次查询的量子算法。
tldr: 本文提出仅通过比较函数值大小的预言机，实现了光滑函数梯度的高效测试与估计，并在经典和量子模型下分别达到了最优或对数级的查询复杂度。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes efficient gradient testing and estimation for smooth functions using only a comparison oracle, achieving optimal or logarithmic query complexity in both classical and quantum models.
